query: SELECT phone, fullName as name, email, MAX(createdAt) as lastSeen, MIN(createdAt) as firstSeen, COUNT(*) as totalRecords FROM (SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM appointments UNION ALL SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM leads UNION ALL SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM offerLeads UNION ALL SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM campRegistrations) AS all_records GROUP BY phone ORDER BY lastSeen DESC LIMIT 5
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xtgvXGdr7mxJSP.root --database HgGpRPs4xs9xrzjfX4xmFY --execute SELECT phone, fullName as name, email, MAX(createdAt) as lastSeen, MIN(createdAt) as firstSeen, COUNT(*) as totalRecords FROM (SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM appointments UNION ALL SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM leads UNION ALL SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM offerLeads UNION ALL SELECT phone, fullName, email, createdAt FROM campRegistrations) AS all_records GROUP BY phone ORDER BY lastSeen DESC LIMIT 5
